title: Ixeridium yakuinsulare
taxonomy: Ixeridium yakuinsulare is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Japan. The exact classification of Ixeridium yakuinsulare is as follows: the genus Ixeridium is within the tribe Senecioneae. Within the family Asteraceae, the order of classification is: Asteraceae > Senecioneae > Ixeridium > Ixeridium yakuinsulare. Further classification includes kingdom: Plantae, phylum: Magnoliophyta, class: Magnoliopsida, and other subcategories.
